body:
The original proof of concept: https://github.com/konard/telegram-terminal-bot (use only text based virtual terminal from here)

`--auto-start-screen-watch-message` should after screen start was successful should launch the separate async process, that will create a message with terminal and will update it with logs, so we will see live action inside screen until it not finish.

When command finishes and the screen is ready for input - we should freeze that message, and attach full screen log to it as a file. So the terminal (aka code block should show last lines).

This option should be turned off by default and always for private repositories.
title: Make the --auto-start-screen-watch-message option for hive-telegram-bot
